issue_statement: The IDE cannot add a stable Delivery column until SCE exposes one canonical delivery projection instead of requiring frontend synthesis across mixed engine and evidence sources.
expected_outcome: SCE publishes one scene-scoped delivery projection contract and command surface that both IDE and CLI can consume directly.
impact_scope: scene delivery projection, handoff/release evidence reuse, IDE Delivery column integration
reproduction_steps: Attempt to render delivery-governance status from only existing task, handoff, and release files
Observe that object identity and scope back-links are not exposed through one canonical payload
Observe that frontend would need to synthesize long-lived delivery truth
forbidden_workarounds: Do not create a frontend-owned permanent delivery registry
Do not encode IDE layout semantics into the engine payload
